title: Syzygium lancilimbum
taxonomy: Syzygium lancilimbum is a species of plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Syzygium, which comprises around 1,200 species of plants. The family Myrtaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes trees, shrubs, and herbs. Syzygium lancilimbum is native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The classification of this plant is further supported by its unique characteristics and morphology.
